overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing a female character walking through a narrow urban alley between concrete walls toward a downtown area with tall office buildings. The scene features clear daylight and modern city architecture with no other pedestrians or vehicles present.

opening at the end of the alley leading to the main city street

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through a narrow urban alley flanked by high concrete walls. As she progresses, a modern glass office tower becomes visible on the left, growing larger as she approaches. The alley opens ahead to a city street, with a parking garage entrance visible on the left side. The environment is devoid of other people or vehicles, emphasizing the quiet, enclosed nature of the downtown passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a confined urban passage that gradually opens into a modern downtown district. It begins with a character walking steadily through a narrow alley flanked by high concrete walls, creating a sense of enclosure. As she progresses, the view expands to reveal a towering glass office building on the left that grows larger and more dominant in the frame. The scene then shifts as the alleyway opens up toward a city street, passing a parking garage entrance before fully emerging into the open urban environment.
